description: Permissions scoped to the main Obelus window. Core permissions are narrowed to just the event listen/unlisten surface the renderer actually uses (via @tauri-apps/api/event.listen and the deep-link/store plugins' internal listeners); every other core:* module is denied. Plugin permissions are pinned to the minimum surface the frontend actually invokes. FS and shell plugins are registered for Rust-side use only (no JS permissions), so the scoped fs_* commands remain the sole filesystem entry point for untrusted callers. The dialog plugin is exposed to JS only for native OS confirmations on destructive actions (dialog:allow-ask).
